## Summary

Describe the maintenance change.

## Safety / hygiene checklist

- [ ] No real personal data, confidential documents, real IDs, INNs, passports, addresses, contracts, or screenshots with PII were added.
- [ ] No token dictionaries, `project_dictionary.json`, `dictionary.json`, token maps, raw text, or real generated reports were added.
- [ ] Examples, fixtures, docs, and tests use synthetic data only.
- [ ] No private/product terms or public roadmap promises were added.
- [ ] Do not claim compliance, DLP, zero-leakage, guaranteed anonymization, or broad security assurance.
- [ ] Hygiene checks were run: `python tools/check_release_hygiene.py` and `python tools/check_public_terms.py`.
